dungeon: Multi-dungeon maxing run — incl. CRAIG'S CASTLE (first footage ever found!) + God of Reptilians
map: DOCUMENTED biomes. CRAIG'S CASTLE = grey STONE CASTLE-INTERIOR arena (dark grey brick/tile floor, open room). Also: red/lava cracked dungeon, gold X-cross temple, grey void boss arenas, green realm, blue water.

bosses.name: Craig, The Worst Nightmare (Craig's Castle boss)
phases: ENRAGE/SCALING — gains power/HP over the fight ('I AM INCREASING IN [strength]', 'DESTROY YOU EVEN MORE')
attacks: bullet-hell in a grey stone arena (boss scales up over time)
bosses.note: = 'Craig the Mad Intern' from the X3.1.1 client rip (161000 HP, 50 def). Dungeon ENTRY line: 'Craig's Castle opened by <player>' (portal opened by a key, like other dungeons). FIRST footage ever located for this dungeon.

bosses.name: God of Reptilians (Reptilian God — Sacrificial Grounds boss)
taunts: prepare to meet your purpose, DOO[M]...
bosses.note: = the 'Reptilian God' the dev blog referenced (Sacrificial Grounds). Announced defeated: '<Blob> The God of Reptilians has been defeated'. CONFIRMS this boss is real + fightable with taunts.

drops: Craig's Castle -> WHITE BAG ('whitebag' called in chat)
Work of the Alchemist (consumable; seen in inventory during Craig fight)
mechanics: MAJOR: CRAIG'S CASTLE footage FOUND (previously proven undocumented in all text sources). Boss 'Craig, The Worst Nightmare' fights in a grey stone castle interior and has an ENRAGE/SCALING mechanic (grows stronger over time, taunting about it), drops white bags. Dungeon opened via a key ('Craig's Castle opened by <player>'). ALSO: 'God of Reptilians' (Sacrificial Grounds boss) confirmed real with taunts. Event/announcer feed: Hermit God defeated, Mysterious Card spawned (personas Bat/Blob/Drake). Player references the iconic 'Fallen Sky' (Handcannon) white-bag grind. 8-member party maxing.
uncertain: Craig taunt endings partly clipped (bracketed). Craig's exact shot pattern not isolated frame-by-frame. 'Work of the Alchemist' may be a pre-owned consumable, not a Craig drop. God of Reptilians taunt endings clipped.
confidence: HIGH — Craig's Castle DOCUMENTED from video (arena=grey castle interior, boss taunts verbatim, enrage mechanic, white-bag drop, entry line); God of Reptilians taunts DOCUMENTED. Headline recovery.
